summary: Frontend UI testing for premium Venue Search Page overhaul. All core premium UI elements are functioning correctly: branded discovery header with gradient background, CURATED COLLECTION badge, venue/city stats, filter sidebar with 'Refine Results' header, 2-column venue grid, BMV VERIFIED badges, view toggle (list/map), and mobile FilterBottomSheet. Known bug persists: activeFilterCount shows '1' on fresh load due to venue_types:[] being truthy.

ui_bugs.issue: Filter count badge shows '1' on fresh page load with no filters applied. Root cause: venue_types:[] (empty array) is truthy in JavaScript. The condition at line 419-421 `value && value !== '' && value !== false` evaluates true for empty arrays.

action_items: FIX MEDIUM: VenueSearchPage.js line 419-421 - add Array.isArray check to prevent venue_types:[] from counting. Suggested fix: add `|| (Array.isArray(value) && value.length === 0)` to the exclusion condition, or restructure to check `Array.isArray(value) ? value.length > 0 : (value && value !== '' && value !== false)`
critical_code_review_comments: VenueSearchPage.js line 419-421: activeFilterCount incorrectly counts venue_types:[] as 1 active filter due to JavaScript empty array being truthy.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all premium UI features pass except known filter count bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Premium UI overhaul for Venue Search Page fully tested. All key features verified: (1) Branded Discovery Header with gradient background from-[#0B1F3B] via-[#153055], CURATED COLLECTION badge with Crown icon, venue count and city count stats (13 VENUES, 4 CITIES), (2) Filter Sidebar with 'Refine Results' header, gradient header from-[#0B1F3B] to-[#153055], card-based design with rounded-2xl, all filter options working (City, Event Type, Venue Type, Setting, Guest Count, Price per Plate, Minimum Rating, Amenities), (3) 2-column grid layout lg:grid-cols-2 with gap-6 lg:gap-8 spacing, (4) VenueCard shows BMV VERIFIED badge, rating badge with star, location with MapPin icon (golden), capacity with Users icon, price in gold (₹/plate format), (5) View toggle List/Map both functional, Map view shows venue markers with sidebar list, (6) Mobile FilterBottomSheet opens correctly with all filter sections, Apply/Clear buttons in sticky footer, X close button works. Known bug: activeFilterCount shows 1 on fresh load (venue_types:[] truthy). data-testid coverage: mobile-filter-btn, venue-type-filter, venue-type-option-{type}, venue-type-apply-btn, sort-select, view-list, view-map, filter-city, filter-event-type, filter-venue-type, filter-guest-min, filter-guest-max, filter-price-min, filter-price-max, filter-chips, clear-filters, venue-card-{id}, filter-bottom-sheet, filter-apply-btn, filter-clear-btn, filter-sheet-close.

frontend.City filter dropdown: PASS - All Cities, Mumbai, Delhi, Gurugram, Noida
frontend.Amenities filter buttons: PASS - Parking, Valet, Alcohol, AC, Catering, Decor
frontend.Sort dropdown works: PASS - Recommended, Price Low/High, Rating High to Low

active_filter_count_bug.root_cause: VenueSearchPage.js line 419-421: The activeFilterCount calculation uses `value && value !== '' && value !== false`. JavaScript empty array [] is truthy, so venue_types:[] passes this condition and is counted as 1 active filter even when no venue types are selected.
active_filter_count_bug.fix: Change the filter condition to explicitly check for empty arrays: `!Array.isArray(value) ? (value && value !== '' && value !== false) : value.length > 0`
active_filter_count_bug.reproduction: Load /venues/search fresh with no URL params. Filter button shows '1' badge. Desktop sidebar shows 'Clear All (1)'.
